Title: Application launch
Objectives: Verify app launches successfully and main window renders
Preconditions: App packaged with required dependencies and PDF/resource files available
Expected_Result: Main window opens without crash | Window title is displayed correctly | Default form is set to Evaluation | Default processing option is set to Folder and PDF | Items and Repairs action buttons are disabled by default

Title: Window icon load fallback
Objectives: Verify missing/invalid icon does not crash app
Test_Steps: 1. Launch app without valid icon file
Expected_Result: App still opens; console prints 'Could not load icon'

Title: Default form selection
Objectives: Verify default selected form is Evaluation
Expected_Result: Evaluation is selected by default

Title: Default processing option
Objectives: Verify default processing option is Folder and PDF
Expected_Result: Folder and PDF is selected by default

Title: Items radio toggle enablement
Objectives: Verify Items popup buttons enable only when Items=Yes
Test_Steps:
1. Set Items=No
2. Observe buttons
3. Set Items=Yes
Expected_Result: Choose items and Copy Text buttons disabled for No and enabled for Yes

Title: Repairs radio toggle enablement
Objectives: Verify Repairs popup buttons enable only when Repairs=Yes
Test_Steps:
1. Set Repairs=No
2. Observe buttons
3. Set Repairs=Yes
Expected_Result: Choose repair items and Copy Text buttons disabled for No and enabled for Yes

Title: Items preview clearing on No
Objectives: Verify Items preview is cleared when radio switched from Yes to No
Test_Steps:
1. Set Items=Yes and select items
2. Switch Items=No
Expected_Result: Items preview clears and buttons disable

Title: Repairs preview clearing on No
Objectives: Verify Repairs preview is cleared when radio switched from Yes to No
Test_Steps:
1. Set Repairs=Yes and select repairs
2. Switch Repairs=No
Expected_Result: Repairs preview clears and buttons disable

Title: Items popup preview
Objectives: Verify preview updates with grouped selected items
Test_Steps:
1. Select multiple items across categories
2. Click Preview
Expected_Result: Preview shows grouped lines by category

Title: Repairs popup preview
Objectives: Verify preview updates with ordered selected repairs
Expected_Result: Preview shows numbered list ordered Replacement > Repair > Cosmetic

Title: Copy items text flow
Objectives: Verify Copy Text copies items text and resets Items section
Expected_Result: Items preview shows selected items

Title: Copy repairs text flow
Objectives: Verify Copy Text copies repairs text and resets Repairs section
Expected_Result: Repairs preview shows selected repairs

Title: Copy items when no text
Objectives: Verify warning when copying empty Items preview
Expected_Result: Text copied to clipboard; Items radio set to No; preview cleared; buttons disabled; info dialog shown

Title: Copy repairs when no text
Objectives: Verify warning when copying empty Repairs preview
Expected_Result: Text copied to clipboard; Repairs radio set to No; preview cleared; buttons disabled; info dialog shown

Title: Extract preview single-row mode
Objectives: Verify Extract Data Only preview shows first extracted row when multi=No
Test_Steps:
1. Keep Multi=No
2. Select Extract Data Only
3. Click Processing Data
Expected_Result: Repairs preview shows only first formatted row as tab-delimited line

Title: Extract preview multi-row mode
Objectives: Verify Extract Data Only preview shows all extracted rows when multi=Yes
Test_Steps:
1. Set Multi=Yes
2. Select Extract Data Only
3. Click Processing Data
Expected_Result: Repairs preview shows all extracted rows, one line per row

Title: Status bar default text
Objectives: Verify initial status bar text
Expected_Result: Status shows 'Looking for input file'

Title: Process button available
Objectives: Verify Processing Data button is visible and clickable
Expected_Result: Button is visible with label 'Processing Data'

Title: Print option default
Objectives: Verify print option defaults to No
Expected_Result: No is selected by default

Title: Long text in preview areas
Objectives: Verify preview text boxes accept multiline content without truncating
Test_Steps:
1. Populate long content
2. Observe preview areas
Expected_Result: Content is displayed in multiline text box with wrapping
